content: "Sono Layla, la donna con cui tuo marito ti tradisce." - "Lasciaci in pace!"
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by dnnywld (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I'm Layla, the woman your husband is cheating on you with. Leave us alone!
rus:Я Лейла, женщина, с которой твой муж тебе изменяет. - Оставь нас в покое!
